'''Fokask''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] within the [[Fokask system/Legends|Fokask system]] in [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. It was home to one of [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo's]] old smuggling friends. This retired [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] sent Solo a copy of the ''[[Fokask Banner]]'', which had a rather slanderous article written about [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]].

{{Planet-stub}}
